summary: Phase 3 MSP Platform Enhancement Testing Complete. All 3 features verified: 1) AMC Form Enhancement with Number of Visits field and Asset Linking, 2) Asset Service History API endpoint, 3) Client Portal with separate auth system. Backend: 26/26 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly.

design_issues.screen: Portal Login, AMC Dialog, Portal User Dialog
issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility best practice (pre-existing)
Console warning: 'navigate() should be called in useEffect' - React Router navigation timing (minor)

critical_code_review_comments: Client Portal auth system works correctly - login, verify, logout all functional
Portal users properly scoped to their client - can only see their own assets/AMCs/contacts
AMC form correctly shows Number of Visits field and Asset Linker when client selected
AMC table displays Visits and Linked Assets columns
Asset Service History API returns comprehensive data including service entries, tasks, AMC contracts, assignment/status history
ServiceBook sidebar correctly shows Client Portal nav item
Portal layout consistent with main app design - amber/slate color scheme
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing
seed_data_creation: Test portal user created and deleted during testing (cleanup complete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Client Portal fully functional. Portal users can be created via admin API or Portal Users admin page. Portal auth uses separate token system stored in localStorage as 'portal_token'. Test portal user email format: test_portal_*@example.com

PHASE3_FEATURE_1_AMC_ENHANCEMENTS.description: AMC Form with Number of Visits field and Asset Linking

PHASE3_FEATURE_3_CLIENT_PORTAL.description: Client Portal with separate auth system

FRONTEND_UI_TESTS.amc_page_columns: PASSED - Visits and Linked Assets columns present

servicebook_tests.amc_form_fields: PASSED - Number of Visits and Asset Linker found
